comment: The Model Interview failure→fix FALLBACK map (docs/product-innovation-brainstorm.md §1). Keyed {tier, outcome} → an AI-readiness rule id (Semanticus.Analysis/ReadinessRules.cs) + a PLAIN-language hint the Studio card shows verbatim (never a rule id — Kane's UX bar). A question's author-supplied fixRuleId always wins; this table only fills the gap so a red row is never a dead end. Lives beside docs/ai-readiness-catalog.json as data (not hardcoded) and is embedded into Semanticus.Engine at build (the format-templates.json precedent) so it cannot drift from the binary. Unverified has no entries on purpose: 'couldn't check' is a connectivity/authoring gap, not a model fix.

map.hint: Record a verified answer for this question so AI returns the trusted number.
Add synonyms so different phrasings of this question land on the same field.
Add AI instructions saying what this model cannot answer, so the assistant declines instead of guessing.
